name: UTSTARCOM HOLDINGS CORP.
summary: PART I ITEM 1BUSINESS OVERVIEW We are a leading provider of interactive, Protocol ("IP")-based network solutions including the integration and support services in Internet Protocol TV ("IPTV"), Interactive ("iD")TV, Internet TV and Broadband for cable and telecom operators. Our focus is to design and sell IP-based telecommunications infrastructure products including our primary product suite of IPTV, and broadband solutions along with the ongoing services relating to the installation, operation ...
